title: Chapter 133
content:
Chapter 133: 133 | Level Ten

She came with a shout, her body clenching around me in waves that seemed to go on forever. I kept drinking, kept thrusting up into her, prolonging her orgasm until she was shaking.

"Don’t stop," she begged, even as her thighs trembled from exertion. "I need to feel you come inside me. Need to feel you fill me up."

\[You drink a mouthful of milk from a Silver-tier target. As a result, you get 50 points!\]

I was close—so close—but I needed more. Needed to make sure I hit that three-orgasm threshold to steal her ability.

With a sudden surge of strength, I flipped us over. Aurora landed on her back with a surprised gasp, her orange hair spreading across the pillows like fire. Before she could protest the change in position, I hooked her legs over my shoulders and drove back into her.

The new angle let me hit spots that had her crying out with each thrust. Her hands clutched at the sheets, knuckles white from the force of her grip.

"Fuck, Jace! Right there—right fucking there!"

I leaned down, capturing her nipple in my mouth again, drinking deeply as I pounded into her. The dual stimulation pushed her over the edge for a second time. Her back arched off the bed, her walls pulsing around me as she came again.

\[You drink a mouthful of milk from a Silver-tier target. As a result, you get 50 points!\]

"Such a good boy," she purred once she could speak again, reaching up to stroke my face. "Making me come like that." Her thumb traced my lower lip, wiping away a drop of milk. "But you still haven’t finished, have you?"

I shook my head, still moving inside her at a steady pace.

"What do you need, baby? Tell me."

"I need one more," I admitted. "Need you to come one more time."

Her eyes widened slightly, understanding dawning. "The ability theft. Three orgasms."

I nodded.

Aurora’s lips curved into a wicked smile. "Then you better work for it."

She placed her hand on the back of my neck, and suddenly every nerve ending in my body lit up like New Year’s Eve. The phantom sensations returned—lips, tongues, fingers everywhere. I couldn’t tell what was real and what was illusion anymore.

"Fuck!" I shouted, my rhythm faltering as pleasure overwhelmed me.

"Keep going," she ordered. "Don’t you dare stop now."

I somehow managed to maintain my thrusts, even as my brain short-circuited from the sensory overload. Aurora was still beneath me, letting me do the work now, watching me struggle with an amused smile.

"You’re so cute when you’re desperate," she said, trailing a finger down my chest. "I bet you want to come so badly."

"I’m trying—to focus—on you," I ground out between thrusts.

"So selfless." She laughed. "I love it."

I shifted my angle slightly, hitting that spot inside her that had made her scream before. Her laughter cut off abruptly, replaced by a gasp.

"There," she breathed. "Right there."

I kept at it, relentless now, driving into her with all the strength I had left. My muscles burned from exertion, sweat dripping down my back, but I couldn’t stop. Wouldn’t stop. Not until I got what I needed.

Aurora’s third orgasm built more slowly than the first two. I could see it in the tension of her body, the way her breathing changed, the flush that spread down her chest.

"Come on," I urged, voice rough with need. "One more time. Come for me."

"Make me," she challenged, eyes flashing with defiance even as her body responded to my movements.

I cranked Euphoric Feedback to level ten—the maximum setting I’d never used before. The effect was immediate and dramatic. Aurora’s entire body went rigid, her eyes flying wide open.

"JACE!" My name became a scream as she convulsed beneath me, her orgasm hitting her with enough force to make her whole body shake.

\[You drink a mouthful of milk from a Silver-tier target. As a result, you get 50 points!\]

◆ ABILITY THEFT COMPLETE ◆

Target: Aurora Fitzgerald (Rank #23, House Obsidian)

Ability Stolen: \[Sensory Hijack\]

Starting Rank: Copper

LIBRARY UPDATED: Total Abilities: 2→ 3

The notification flashed across my vision just as my own control finally snapped. I buried myself deep inside her and came harder than I ever had before, my vision blacking out at the edges as pleasure crashed through me in waves. I vaguely registered Aurora’s nails digging into my back, her legs locking around my waist to keep me inside her.

"Fill me up," she whispered against my ear. "Give me everything."

I did. I couldn’t have held back if I tried. My hips jerked against hers as I emptied myself inside her, the intensity of it making me groan her name.

When it was finally over, I collapsed on top of her, my face buried in her neck. We were both breathing hard, bodies slick with sweat and Aurora’s milk. I should have been disgusted. Instead, I felt... powerful. Satisfied. Complete.

Aurora’s fingers traced lazy patterns on my back, her touch gentle now that the frenzy had passed.

"So," she said after a moment, "did it work? Did you get it?"

I nodded against her skin. "Sensory Hijack. Copper rank."

"Mmm." She sounded pleased. "Going to use it on me sometime?"

"Would that even work? Using your own ability against you?"

She laughed. "Probably not. I’d know all the counters." Her hand moved to my hair, stroking it almost absently. "But you could use it on the others. Belle and Naomi."

The thought sent a jolt of interest through my spent body. "That’s... an interesting suggestion."

"I’m full of interesting suggestions." She shifted beneath me. "As much as I’m enjoying this post-coital bonding, you’re getting heavy."

I rolled off her, flopping onto my back beside her. The ceiling of the sanctum was painted with subtle constellations that glowed faintly in the dim light. I hadn’t noticed that detail before.

Aurora propped herself up on one elbow, looking down at me. Her hair fell in a curtain around her face, still somehow perfect despite everything we’d just done.

"So how long does this buff thing last?" she asked, running a hand over her breast. "The milk situation."

"About twenty-four hours. After that, you’ll need another... session."

"And I’m guessing you’ll be happy to provide that?" Her smile was knowing.

"It’s a sacrifice I’m willing to make."

She laughed, slapping my chest lightly. "You’re ridiculous."

A notification appeared in my peripheral vision:

◆ DIVINE EMPOWERMENT ACTIVATED ◆

Target: Aurora Fitzgerald

Status Effect Applied: \[Divine Empowerment\]

BUFF DETAILS:

├─ Duration: 48 hours

├─ Ability Rank: Increased by 1 tier

├─ Physical Performance: 125% effectiveness

├─ Mana Pool: +30% maximum capacity

├─ Stamina: Enhanced

└─ Confidence: Significantly boosted

Wait. Forty-eight hours? That was double the normal duration.

"What’s wrong?" Aurora asked, noticing my expression.

"Nothing. Just... your buff lasted longer than usual. Forty-eight hours instead of twenty-four."

"Really?" She looked pleased. "Must be because I’m just that special."

Before I could respond, another notification appeared:

◆ SANCTUM TIME WARNING ◆

5 minutes remaining in Private Sanctum

Auto-ejection in: 4:58
